title: String Commands
description: Operasi pada tipe data String di Redis — tipe paling dasar dan serbaguna.

commands.name: SET / GET
commands.title: Set dan Get Value
commands.syntax:
SET key value [EX seconds] [PX milliseconds] [NX|XX]
GET key

options.description: Set hanya jika key belum ada
Set hanya jika key sudah ada

commands.examples:
SET name "John Doe"
GET name

# Dengan expiry
SET session:123 "user_data" EX 3600

# Set hanya jika belum ada (distributed lock)
SET lock:resource1 "owner123" NX EX 30

# Set dan get old value
SET counter 10 GET  # return old value
commands.notes: SET NX EX adalah pattern umum untuk distributed locking.

commands.name: MSET / MGET
commands.title: Multiple Set dan Get
commands.description: Set atau get beberapa key sekaligus dalam satu operasi.
commands.syntax:
MSET key1 val1 key2 val2 ...
MGET key1 key2 ...

options.description: Set multiple hanya jika SEMUA key belum ada

commands.examples:
MSET name "John" age "30" city "Jakarta"
MGET name age city
MSETNX key1 "val1" key2 "val2"
commands.notes: MSET/MGET lebih efisien daripada multiple SET/GET karena satu round-trip.

commands.name: INCR / DECR
commands.title: Increment dan Decrement
commands.description: Menambah atau mengurangi nilai integer secara atomic.
commands.syntax:
INCR key
INCRBY key increment
DECR key
DECRBY key decrement
INCRBYFLOAT key increment
commands.examples:
SET counter 100
INCR counter          # 101
INCRBY counter 10     # 111
DECR counter          # 110
DECRBY counter 5      # 105
INCRBYFLOAT price 1.5 # float increment
commands.notes: INCR atomic — aman digunakan oleh multiple client bersamaan (rate limiter, counter).

commands.name: APPEND / STRLEN / GETRANGE
commands.title: Manipulasi String
commands.description: Menambahkan, mengukur, dan mengambil sebagian string.
commands.syntax:
APPEND key value
STRLEN key
GETRANGE key start end
SETRANGE key offset value
commands.examples:
SET greeting "Hello"
APPEND greeting " World"  # "Hello World"
STRLEN greeting           # 11
GETRANGE greeting 0 4     # "Hello"
SETRANGE greeting 6 "Redis"  # "Hello Redis"
commands.notes: GETRANGE menggunakan index 0-based. -1 berarti karakter terakhir.

commands.name: SETNX / SETEX / GETDEL
commands.title: Set Conditional & Utility
commands.syntax:
SETNX key value
SETEX key seconds value
GETDEL key
GETEX key [EX seconds]

options.description: Set if Not eXists (deprecated, gunakan SET NX)
Set with Expiry (deprecated, gunakan SET EX)

commands.examples:
SETNX lock "owner"     # Set hanya jika belum ada
SETEX cache 300 "data" # Set dengan TTL 5 menit
GETDEL temp_token      # Ambil dan hapus
GETEX session EX 1800  # Get dan perpanjang TTL
commands.notes: Gunakan SET dengan opsi NX/EX sebagai ganti SETNX/SETEX (lebih modern dan atomic).
